TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Pranab_Mukherjee, title = Pranab_Mukherjee, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pranab_Mukherjee} }

S.FORM: I 1935 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 11 a romi'ad masofoc ci Pranab Mukherjee, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no India anini i ci Pranab Mukherjee, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 25 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i pranab~b~v mo~u~ukńß…ôrj…ô…ô, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u in…¨~…ģia anini i ¶i pranab~b~v mo~u~ukńß…ôrj…ô…ô, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1935 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 11 a romi'ad masofoc ci Pranab Mukherjee, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no India anini i ci Pranab Mukherjee, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 25 a romi'ad.
